transactions.desc: The Diamondbacks optioned Drake to Triple-A Reno on Wednesday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Bratt from Triple-A Reno on Wednesday.
The Diamondbacks reinstated Santana (adductor) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday and designated him for assignment.
The Angels recalled Lowe from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday. He'll start in center field and bat eighth in the Angels' series finale with the Orioles.
Atlanta selected Hamilton's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Wednesday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta activated Kinley (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Rockies recalled Halvorsen from Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday.
The Nationals recalled Palmquist from Triple-A Rochester, and he'll serve as the team's opening pitcher for Wednesday's game against the Phillies, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Cubs designated Nunez for assignment Wednesday.
The Cubs recalled Hollowell from Triple-A Iowa on Wednesday.
The Yankees recalled Cabrera from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Wednesday, Jack Curry of YES Network reports.
The Twins recalled Funderburk from Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
The Twins recalled Raya from Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
The Twins optioned Rojas to Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
The Twins designated Voth for assignment Wednesday.
The Cubs selected Velasquez's contract from Triple-A Iowa on Wednesday, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Cubs recalled Ferguson from Triple-A Iowa on Wednesday, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Marlins optioned Fulton to Triple-A Jacksonville on Wednesday.
The Marlins reinstated Perez (gracilis) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday against the Rangers.
The Rangers recalled Santos from Double-A Frisco on Wednesday.
The Rangers optioned Corniell to Triple-A Round Rock on Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Pintaro from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday, Anthony DiComo of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals optioned  Schultz to Triple-A Rochester following Tuesday's 14-9 loss to the Phillies.
Hunt was optioned to Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
Fermin (concussion) was reinstated from the 7-day injured list Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Sears from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The St. Louis Cardinals traded RHP Chris Roycroft to the Tampa Bay Rays. The Rays then optioned him to the minors.
The Mets claimed Oliva off waivers from the Giants on Tuesday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
